findings.description: PascalCase class names from the `define([...])` code block in s5 are missing from hints: "ListBuilder", "AutoSum", "Tab". These module names appear directly in the s5 code example and are distinct UI component names a user might search for.
findings.source_evidence: Source define block lists: "nablarch/ui/ListBuilder", "nablarch/ui/AutoSum", "nablarch/ui/Tab" — all PascalCase identifiers present in the s5 section content.

findings.description: The file "text.js" (テキストリソースローダ) appears in the s8 file table but is absent from s8 hints. It is a distinct component file a user might search for by name.
findings.source_evidence: Source file table row: テキストリソースローダ | ○ | △ | /js/text.js | require.jsの拡張プラグイン。JavaScript以外のテキストリソースをXHR経由で動的にロードする。
